sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.17 fixes three Extra-Time UI issues. The Step-1 Extra-Time "?" help icon no longer toggles the Extra-Time checkbox when clicked and now shows its tooltip on hover. The post-scan Extra-Time view (Rescan ET Candidates) now survives WordPress-admin navigation: leaving the scanner page and returning restores the Extra-Time URL list with your selections, the same way the results screen already persists. The per-URL Credits column on the results table now shows the correct base+1 credit for URLs that ran a billed Extra-Time continuation, matching the amount charged (older scans without the data show base credits only). Display and UI only; no scan-behavior or billing change.
